steps.title: Show coexistence
steps.content: The first idea is that Haddad's poem suggests a fluid interplay of poetry and painting. The next idea is that the poem also highlights tensions between those modes. The transition must show that both observations are true at once.

steps.title: Reject result and restatement signals
steps.content: Choice B would make the tensions a result. Choice C would make the tensions a specific example of the interplay. Choice D would make the two ideas equivalent. The needed transition signals simultaneous contrast and coexistence. The answer is A.
